web.title: koji/mastra-app-template: mastra template with nextjs + assistant ui
web.description: Add llm api key you want to use in .env. In this repo, the app uses CEREBRAS via ai-sdk. You can use any api that AI SDK supports easily.

web.title: Full-Stack Integration - Mastra - assistant-ui
web.description: Integrate Mastra directly into your Next.js application's API routes. This approach keeps your backend and frontend code within the same project.
